raw_description:
Situated on the banks of Sharjahs’ Khalid Lagoon, Corniche Hotel Sharjah is a 5-star hotel that offers spacious rooms with views of the lagoon or Sharjah. Free private parking is available on site.

The air-conditioned rooms at Corniche Hotel Sharjah feature modern, elegant décor. Each comes with a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with toiletries. Interconnecting rooms are available in the Deluxe Rooms and Suites.

Buffet-style breakfasts and dinners are served at Mojo All Day Dining Restaurant, while authentic Iranian cuisine is served at Shiraz Restaurant. Guests can enjoy exotic cocktails in the lobby lounge.

Corniche Hotel Sharjah has 2 outdoor pools and steam rooms for men and women. Guests can also play a game of squash or work out in the gym. There is a separate children’s pool.

Sharjah’s city centre is just 10 minutes by car. Dubai International Airport is a 20-minute drive from Corniche Hotel Sharjah.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.9for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Corniche Hotel Sharjah. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Free parking.
